---
title: "gtsummary and ggpubr for hypothesis testing"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

> Produce Table 1, Table 2, and figures-with-p-values for a randomized cohort using gtsummary and ggpubr.

## Slides
[Make slides full screen](slides.qmd)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```

{{< include exercise_1.qmd >}}

{{< include exercise_2.qmd >}}
